title: Commissions
description: Professional custom music commissions. Each piece is created with attention to detail and care.

processSteps.title: Contact
processSteps.description: Share your idea and requirements, and we’ll find the best option for you.

processSteps.title: Payment
processSteps.description: Payment is made through Ko-fi to begin the process.

processSteps.title: Delivery
processSteps.description: You receive the final files in a .zip along with usage rights.

termsPreview.title: Terms and Conditions
termsPreview.description: Before requesting a commission, please review the terms.
items: I reserve the right to decline any request that does not align with my values or that I cannot fulfill.
No refunds once work has started.
Credit is required when using the work unless full rights were purchased.
The client is responsible for any legal issues related to the use of the work.

waitlist.title: Waitlist
waitlist.note: By continuing, you agree to the Terms and Conditions.

cta.title: Ready to bring your vision to life?
cta.description: Commissions are currently open. Feel free to contact me if you have any questions!
